title: Algerian Pepper Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew from Algeria, featuring tender peppers and aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: algerian
ingredients.notes: use ras el hanout spice blend

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the sliced green pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the Algerian spice blend and stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the stew simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
